title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. graminifolium
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. graminifolium, also known as the Chinese water plantain or 'zè zi' in Chinese, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the water plantain family (Alismataceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and promote digestion. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. graminifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. graminifolium is often prepared as a decoction or dried powder, and can be used to make teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
